scripts.lint:suppressions-justified:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const out=execSync('grep -rn eslint-disable src/ || true',{encoding:'utf8'});const lines=out.split('
').filter(l=>l.includes('eslint-disable')&&!l.includes('eslint-disable-line')&&!l.includes('eslint-disable-next-line'));const unjust=lines.filter(l=>!l.includes('i18n-allowlisted'));if(unjust.length){console.error('Unjustified eslint-disable found:
'+unjust.join('
'));process.exit(1);}else{console.log('All suppressions are justified.');}"
